message_text: Please send the signed form by 5pm today.
FYI the office will be closed next Monday.
Can you confirm your attendance by Friday?
Reminder to bring your ID badge tomorrow.
Post the weekly report in the shared folder by end of day.
Don't forget to submit your timesheet by Friday.
Reminder to collect your new ID badge from reception, every Monday.
There may be a delay in response due to high volume of requests.
